zh.Layer Marney, Essex, England: 英國艾可萊也 芒尼
zh.Bradwell, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉德維爾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Katherine de Venables於1300年出生在英國英格蘭素福爾可布拉德維爾時，她的父親Hugh de Venables44歲，母親Agatha de Vernon20歲。她於1316年與Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney在英國艾可萊也 芒尼結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世在英國英格蘭艾可。

zh-hans.Layer Marney, Essex, England: 英国艾可萊也 芒尼
zh-hans.Bradwell, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可布拉德維爾
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Katherine de Venables于1300年出生在英国英格兰素福爾可布拉德維爾时，她的父亲Hugh de Venables44岁，母亲Agatha de Vernon20岁。她于1316年与Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney在英国艾可萊也 芒尼结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世在英国英格兰艾可。

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Katherine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of   Christopher ;  also of   Katherine   and its variants. In the medieval period it was a pet form of   Christian   and   Christiana .

variants.name: Christopher
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Pet form of any of the given names beginning with the letter D- ( compare Jay and Kay ), in particular Dorothy . It is also used as an independent name, and may in some cases be associated with the River Dee ( compare Clyde ).

en.lifeSummary: When Katherine de Venables was born in 1300, in Bradwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh de Venables, was 44 and her mother, Agatha de Vernon, was 20. She married Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney in 1316, in Layer Marney, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. She died in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Katherine de Venables est née en 1300, à Bradwell, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh de Venables, avait 44 ans et sa mère, Agatha de Vernon, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney en 1316, à Layer Marney, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée à Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Katherine de Venables 1300 in Bradwell, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh de Venables 44 und ihre Mutter Agatha de Vernon 20. Sie hat 1316 in Layer Marney, Essex, England Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Sie starb in Essex, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Venables è nata il nel 1300 nel Bradwell, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh de Venables, aveva 44 anni e sua madre, Agatha de Vernon, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney nel 1316, nel Layer Marney, Essex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Essex, England: イギリスイギリスエセックス
ja.Bradwell, Cheshire, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクブラドウエル
ja.lifeSummary: Katherine de Venablesが1300年にイギリスイギリススフォルクブラドウエルで生まれた時，父Hugh de Venablesは44歳，母Agatha de Vernonは20歳であった。1316年にイギリスエセックスレヤー マルニーでSir William de Marney of Layer Marneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女はイギリスイギリスエセックスで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Katherine de Venables(이)가 1300년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 브라드웰에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh de Venables(은)는 44세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Agatha de Vernon(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1316년 영국 에세스 레이어 마니에서 Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 에세스에서 사망했다.

mn.Bradwell, Cheshire, England: Bradwell, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Katherine de Venables nasceu em 1300, em Bradwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh de Venables, tinha 44 anos e sua mãe, Agatha de Vernon, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney em 1316, em Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Katherine de Venables родилась в 1300 г. в местности брадвелл, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh de Venables было 44 года, а матери, которую звали Agatha de Vernon, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney в 1316 г. в местности леиир марни, эссекс, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Она умерла в местности эссекс, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Katherine de Venables nació en 1300, en Bradwell, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh de Venables, tenía 44 años y su mamá, Agatha de Vernon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Sir William de Marney of Layer Marney en 1316, en Layer Marney, Essex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
